notes: SHIP v1.14.291 - Ship 4 design-call #1 (owner-decided at device-verify): OK/pass status dot -> Mint #3DDC84 (the N-07 'one green, one job' green finding its home: pass/ok/healthy ONLY). Added :root token --ok:#3DDC84. Recolored the last live/source green #39e09b (rgba 57,224,155) to var(--ok)/mint on the Command status system: #pg-cmd .spill .dot (OK/online status dot, L9109) + #pg-cmd .shiftpill base + .dot (L9119/L9120 - the on-shift pill; was dead-overridden by se-* states but still source-green, now clean). Channel map now: cyan=active/primary, MINT=pass/good, violet=secondary, mag=fault, gold=attention, teal=complete. With .289 (.pbar-glow delete) + .290 (blocker red->mag / green->cyan), the Command house now has NO stray/decorative green - mint is the ONLY green, status-only. CSS-only, no JS/data. Three-stamp .290->.291. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): OK/online status dots read MINT (not old green); on-shift pill states unchanged (cyan countdown / gold ended/unset). Remaining Ship-4 design calls: #2 glow-normalize / one-emitter (hero is the sole lit card; NBA + stat tiles + trow tiles go idle-dark), #3 askrow SCAN-ID tile, #4 hero mag strip + BLOCKER verb accent.
